title: Ivory Flower Girl Basket with Shiny Diamante Double Heart Embellishment - Perfect for Wedding Ceremony Party
features: Elegant Design: Our ivory flower girl basket features a stunning shiny diamante double heart embellishment, adding a touch of glamour and romance to your wedding ceremony.
Perfect for Weddings: This flower girl basket is designed specifically for wedding ceremonies, providing an exquisite accessory for your flower girl to carry and scatter petals down the aisle.
Premium Quality: Made with satin, PVC board, and rhinestone, this flower girl basket is durable and designed to withstand regular use.
Ivory Color: The basket comes in a beautiful ivory color, a classic choice that complements a wide range of wedding themes and color palettes.

Ideal Size: With a diameter of approximately 12.5cm (4.92 inches), a height of approximately 21cm (8.27 inches) with the handle, and a height of approximately 10.5cm (4.13 inches) without the handle, this flower girl basket is the perfect size for comfortable carrying and flower scattering.
description: Vintage Satin Wedding Flower Girl Basket Double Heart Rhinestone Decor Ivory White flowergirl basket with shiny diamante double heart embellishment Perfect for wedding ceremony party Material: Satin, PVC board,rhinestone Color: Ivory Diameter: Approx. 12.5cm / 4.92inch Height with Handle:Approx.21cm / 8.27inch Height without Handle:Approx.10.5cm / 4.13inch NOTE: TEH SILK PETALS ARE EXCLUDED. Package Includes: 1 x Flower Girl Basket Note: Please be reminded that due to lighting effects and monitor's brightness/contrast settings etc, the color tone of the website's photo and the actual item could be slightly different.
